# .gitignore

**Path:** .gitignore
**Syntax:** text
**Generated:** 2026-03-26 19:01:15

```
project-clean/

# Doc-gen generated files 
.doc-gen/backup

# Legacy generated docs (removed)
docs/mirror/



# Python
.venv/
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python
*.so
*.egg
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/

# Testing
.pytest_cache/
.coverage
htmlcov/

# IDEs
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# OS
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Secrets and credentials - NEVER commit these
.env
.env.*
.env.local
.env.production
.env.development
*.env

# API keys and tokens
*.key
*.pem
*.cert
*.crt
*.p12
*.pfx
secrets.yml
secrets.yaml
credentials.json
credentials.yaml

# SSH keys (if stored in project)
id_rsa
id_ed25519
*.pub

# Cloud provider credentials
.aws/credentials
.gcloud/
.azure/

# Database connection strings
database.yml
database.ini
db_config.json

# Service account files
service-account*.json
*-credentials.json

```
